tagline: Build personal dashboards with draggable tile grids

highlights.title: Drag & Drop Grid
highlights.description: Arrange tiles on a snapping grid canvas. Move by dragging, resize from edges — the board adapts instantly.

highlights.title: Smart Resize
highlights.description: Tiles declare their size breakpoints. When resized beyond them, the agent gets a screenshot and optimizes the layout automatically.

highlights.title: Live Data Tiles
highlights.description: 10 built-in tiles with real-time APIs, interactive state, and SVG data viz — from crypto sparklines to habit trackers.
